summary: Cycle P (16th overnight-triage fire of UTC 2026-05-22) declined to generate a 16th near-identical journal + re-run regen-all. Substantive output is the cadence-pattern surfacing in cycle P's journal § Blockers. 15 prior commits today carry identical subject 'Overnight triage 2026-05-22 - 0 reports, 0 proposals, 0 FIQ entries graded'. Next cycle's Critic should read cycle P's journal before re-running the prompt; if the inbox state is still empty AND cadence is unchanged, next cycle should also exit non-substantively rather than add to noise.
founder_action_items: Investigate cron cadence — 16 fires/UTC date on empty-inbox path is producing compounding journal noise
Tighten empty-inbox exit in the overnight-triage prompt (guard on last-commit-recency + dashboard-freshness)
Investigate why FIQ + bug-reports inboxes never appeared on disk (path mismatch, broken hook, or aspirational paths in directive)
